description: You are a field epidemiologist at a state health department. Format the foodborne illness outbreak report at /home/ga/Documents/outbreak_report.odt according to the publication guidelines found at /home/ga/Desktop/bulletin_guidelines.txt. The draft contains raw text, unformatted pathogen names, and comma-separated epidemiological data (attack rates) that must be formatted into a 2-column layout with structured headings, italicized pathogen scientific names, a formatted table, and adjusted alignment. Save the completed report to its original location. The document is currently open in Calligra Words.

metadata.table_caption: Table 1: Food-Specific Attack Rates for Implicated Items
body_alignment_samples: On October 12, 2025, the State Department of Health
A matched case-control study was conducted
Environmental swabs were collected from the deli slicers
The implicated deli meats were recalled
